_meta.experiment: Frontier K2+distill vs K3-PTQ cross-model (2nd model, multi-benchmark)

verdict: Cross-model confirmation (2nd model). K3-PTQ beats K2+distill CLEARLY on math (gsm8k 0.59>>0.38) and ARC (0.46>0.40), but TIES on HellaSwag (0.49 vs 0.51, both ~FP 0.46, within N=100 noise -> NOT significant). => K3-advantage over K2+distill lives in REASONING, not commonsense. Combined with Qwen2.5-1.5B (K3-PTQ > K2+distill on all 3): Paper H ordering holds cross-model, with the gap concentrated in math. K2-PTQ collapses math again (0.65->0.01). Caveats: N=100, 1 seed, 300 steps.
